result.stderr:
Compori.MagentoApi.SoapSvcUtil 0.1.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Compori

  -a, --base-endpoint-address           Required. Endpoint address to shop

  --user-agent                          User agent.

  -t, --access-token                    Access token.

  -u, --admin-token-request-user        Admin user to generate access token.

  -p, --admin-token-request-password    Admin user to generate access token.

  --http-auth-user                      Http authentification user name.

  --http-auth-password                  Http authentification user name.

  -s, --service-file                    Required. File with services. Each
                                        service name has its own line

  -o, --output-folder                   Required. Folder to write generated
                                        services files.

  -n, --base-namespace                  Required. Base namespace of generated
                                        services classes.

  --help                                Display this help screen.

  --version                             Display version information.

result.stderr:
Compori.MagentoApi.SoapSvcUtil 0.1.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Compori

  -a, --base-endpoint-address           Required. Endpoint address to shop

  --user-agent                          User agent.

  -t, --access-token                    Access token.

  -u, --admin-token-request-user        Admin user to generate access token.

  -p, --admin-token-request-password    Admin user to generate access token.

  --http-auth-user                      Http authentification user name.

  --http-auth-password                  Http authentification user name.

  -o, --output-file                     Write the services into a file.

  --with-service-endpoint               Add the services endpoint sperated with
                                        a ';' after service name.

  --silent                              Suppress info output.

  --help                                Display this help screen.

  --version                             Display version information.
